div.head: The Counselor of Embassy in China (Jones) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Nanking, August 22, 1949—3 p. m.
[Received August 22—8:05 a. m.]

div.p: 1857. Deptel 969, August 16Not printed. approves division Embassy’s supervisory functions following basis: Consulates Communist-occupied regions continue report personnel changes, administrative problems, visa policy, etc., to Nanking, while consulates in Nationalist areas report to Embassy Canton-Hong Kong for advice and supervision.
Sent circular Shanghai, Peiping, Dairen, Embassy Canton; repeated Department and Hankow. Department pass Tientsin, Tsingtao.
